mission.title: tikv: Implement CompareAndDelete for the RawKV API
mission.description: Implement CompareAndDelete for the RawKV API. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current tikv setup
steps.description:
Verify your tikv version and configuration:
```bash
tikv-server --version
```
This feature requires a working tikv installation.

steps.title: Review tikv configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant tikv configuration:
## Feature Request

### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe:

The Raw KV API has `CompareAndSwap` which allows us to atomically read-modify-write a key.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Implement CompareAndDelete for the RawKV API
steps.description:
### What is changed and how it works?

Issue Number: Close #18838 

This PR extends the rawkv CompareAndSwap API to allow for key deletions. It allows users to achieve atomic compare and delete semantics. The implementation utilizes a new field `raw_cas_delete` in the `Context` message in

resolution.summary:
### What is changed and how it works?

Issue Number: Close #18838 

This PR extends the rawkv CompareAndSwap API to allow for key deletions. It allows users to achieve atomic compare and delete semantics. The implementation utilizes a new field `raw_cas_delete` in the `Context` message in [kvrpcpb.proto](https://github.com/pingcap/kvproto/commit/3cb428bfb56c52446311d5d4fd40a36119c526a2).
